title: External asset manifest (external_asset_v1)
description: What an external producer delivers alongside a 3D model so the game_iso_v1 pipeline can read it. See docs/external_asset_contract.md.

archetype.description: logical family, e.g. biped, bird; selects the shared rig + animation library

mesh.description: glb (preferred) or obj, relative to this manifest. Omit for an animation-library-only delivery.

up.description: source up axis (glTF=y); pipeline converts to +Z

forward.description: facing of the bind pose; pipeline rotates to +X = direction 0

rig.description: rig profile id (pipeline/schema/rig_profiles/<rig>.json). Omit for a static mesh -> procedural animation.

region_source.description: how HIT regions are tagged (material_name ships today)

textures.description: named texture maps relative to this manifest, e.g. base_color, normal, roughness

clip.description: glTF animation clip name (defaults to the state key)

animations.description: state name -> clip; the pipeline samples each clip into `frames` poses x 16 directions

world_metrics.description: optional override; otherwise measured from the mesh
